title: Infinite Ikea
description: A datapack that adds SCP-3008, otherwise known as a the infinite Ikea to Minecraft.
body:
##  **Description:**
This datapack adds SCP-3008, otherwise known as the infinite Ikea to minecraft.  SCP-3008 is, just as the name suggests, an Ikea that goes on forever.  The SCP is inhabited by strange faceless beings known as "Staff" which become aggressive at night.  Will you be able to survive and find an exit?
## **Features:**
-A new dimension with a day/night cycle

-A new mob

-A new structure in the overworld

-New advancements

## **Getting Started:**
-Find the new "Ikea" structure spawning in the plains and click the doors to enter the new dimension.

-Explore the infinite Ikea and search for supplies, you may even find villagers with custom trades.

-Set up shelter before nightfall as this is when the Staff become aggressive, you may try to sleep but it's useless as the night cannot be skipped.

-Find an exit to escape the Ikea, but be quick as these tend to move at random.

-(Bonus Tip): The Staff can also break blocks.

## **Special Thanks:**
Thanks to MrCube6 for the infinite generation (I'm too dumb to make something like that myself lol)

## **WARNING:**
In order for this to work properly your render distance must be set to 15 in the custom dimension, anything more and you'll see into the void, anything less and it won't generate!
